steps.title: Focus on both soundscapes
steps.content: The student's goal is to indicate that both soundscapes are on the list. The response must name the cicadas at Yama-dera and the birds at Higashiyama Botanical Garden, then say both are listed.

steps.title: Reject incomplete options
steps.content: A describes the list but names neither soundscape. B names only the bird soundscape. D names only the cicada soundscape and focuses on cultural significance. The sentence that names both soundscapes and states that both are on the list satisfies the goal. The answer is C.
